
[source layer]
  (F-series)
    [must-fix] UF-F3 main.tex — \fontsize{14pt}{16pt}\selectfont overrides template's 12pt default (required: no \fontsize{...}{...}\selectfont override in source (template's 12pt applies))
      fix: Remove the `\fontsize{...}{...}\selectfont` override; the UF template's `\LoadClass[12pt]` (cls:1) sets 12-point throughout.
      see: https://github.com/YuZh98/latex2ufdissertation/blob/main/docs/uf-rules.md#uf-f3--font-size-12pt

Summary: 1 must-fix, 0 review.
